auth.description: Your personal AI-maintained knowledge base. Wiki content lives in your own Google Drive.
auth.driveAccessRequired: Google Drive access is required. Please sign in again and approve Drive access.

workspace.name: Workspace name
workspace.driveReconnectFailed: Google Drive still cannot reconnect after reauthorization. Confirm Drive access is granted and try again.
workspace.startGoogleFailed: Failed to start Google sign-in. Reload and try again.
workspace.noWorkspaces: No workspaces yet. Create one to get started.
workspace.deleteWorkspaceConfirm: Delete "{name}"? This removes its wiki metadata and tries to move its Drive folder to trash.
workspace.maintenanceDesc: Health check + dedupe: fix dead links, merge duplicates, re-file misplaced pages (all workspaces)
workspace.maintenanceConfirm: The AI will scan ALL your workspaces and directly fix dead links and contradictions, merge duplicated knowledge, re-file misplaced pages, and adjust workspaces when needed (rename / create / delete empty ones). These changes are written for real and may take a few minutes. Continue?
workspace.maintenanceBackgroundHint: You can close this page — it keeps running in the background
workspace.initFailed: Auto-setup failed. Please try creating your workspace manually.

wiki.createNoteHint: Create a note page first, then edit it in Markdown.
wiki.zoneWikiHint: LLM-maintained knowledge pages live here and update as you ingest and chat.
wiki.zoneNotesHint: This is your own note space. The LLM can read it, but will not overwrite it.
wiki.zoneSchemaHint: These files control ingest, query, and lint behavior. Edit them when you want to steer the system.
wiki.selectPage: Select a page from the sidebar
wiki.linkedPageMissing: This linked page doesn't exist yet. Ask the AI to create it in chat, or run a health check to clean up dead links.
wiki.lockedTitle: Locked — LLM will not overwrite. Click to unlock.
wiki.unlockedTitle: Unlocked — LLM may update. Click to lock.
wiki.discardChangesConfirm: You have unsaved changes. Discard them?

ingest.placeholder: Paste a URL, text or Markdown, or drop files here (Ctrl+Enter to submit)

sources.title: Ingested sources
sources.immutableHint: Sources are immutable after ingest (Karpathy principle); this list is for reviewing results.

settings.title: Settings
settings.noProfiles: No profiles yet. Add one below.
settings.aiPermissionsBody: How the AI handles destructive actions (deleting pages or workspaces).
settings.aiConfirmOnHint: The AI proposes; you confirm in the chat before it runs
settings.aiConfirmOffHint: The AI may delete directly; Drive trash still allows recovery
settings.apiKeyKeepHint: Leave blank to keep current key
settings.confirmDeleteProfile: Delete this LLM profile? Workspaces bound to it will fall back to the default profile.

help.title: Help
help.workspaceBody: Use the workspace menu to switch, drag to reorder, or create workspaces. Knowledge pages are AI-maintained; the lock icon on each page protects it from AI overwrites. You can also ask the AI in chat to create, rename, or delete workspaces.
help.ingestBody: Click the bot button left of the chat input → "Import content" to paste a URL, text, or Markdown, or drop / pick .txt / .md files. The target workspace defaults to "Auto", letting the AI decide where the content belongs.
help.chatBody: The chat defaults to the page you're viewing as context. Type "@" to tag another workspace as extra context. The AI files valuable content into knowledge pages; destructive actions show a confirmation card first (switchable in Settings). The wand button in the top bar runs auto-classify + dedupe across all workspaces.
help.settingsBody: Settings manages LLM profiles, language, appearance, and rules. Rules are the prompt files that control ingest, query, and health checks.
help.driveBody: If Drive access expires, reconnect when prompted. After returning to the app or web page, workspace and profile data refresh automatically.
help.toolsBody: Click the magnifying-glass icon and type 2+ characters to full-text search the wiki. The GitFork button opens the knowledge graph: nodes are pages, edges are wikilinks; isolated gray dots are orphaned pages not yet referenced by anything — click any node to navigate. The flask button runs a wiki health check: the LLM finds and fixes orphaned pages, broken wikilinks, and concept overlaps, then opens a lint report (_lint/date.md).
